title: Getting an error message regarding a non-GROUP-BY column rather than an unknown identifier
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR, c3 DATE);
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', DATE '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (2, NULL, DATE '2023-01-02');
SELECT count(c1) AS c2 FROM (SELECT count(*) AS c1, c2 FROM t1 GROUP BY c2) AS t2 GROUP BY c2;
SELECT count(c1) AS c2 FROM (SELECT count(*) AS c1, c3 FROM t1 GROUP BY c3) AS t2;
key_bug_features: Error on non-GROUP-BY column in aggregate query
